step_by_step_reasoning: We identify the client channels as UserConsumerWeb sending reviews to the API layer on EC2. The API saves reviews in the Arango DB (ThirdParty). SageMaker fetches data from Arango DB for managed training, hyperparameter optimization, and batch transform. The generated tags are saved back to Arango DB.

graph.name: Redbus ML-powered User Review Tagging with Amazon SageMaker
graph.notes: Redbus uses Amazon SageMaker to build a machine learning pipeline that automatically classifies and generates tags from unstructured user reviews stored in ArangoDB.

nodes.name: Channels
nodes.notes: Redbus channels where users submit reviews.

nodes.name: Arango DB
nodes.notes: Graph database storing unstructured user reviews and tags.

nodes.name: SageMaker Pipeline
nodes.notes: Runs Managed Training, BYOA (Scikit-Learn/Random Forest), Automatic Model Tuning (HPO), and Batch Transform.

edges.notes: SageMaker reads training data and batch inference inputs.
Saves generated dynamic tags and model metadata back.
